  • weekly picks (Jun 4 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 4th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score : 22671

    2606.26226v1 Toric code made subsystem: a framework for topological subsystem codes using anticommuting quantum spin liquids (arXiv)

    • Score : 21124

    98j3-424f Edge Reconstruction in a Quantum Spin Hall Insulator (PRL)

    • Score : 20113

    2606.21652v1 Trial wavefunction for fractional quantum spin Hall insulators (arXiv)

    • Score : 19891

    2606.26444v1 Quantum Hall effect in three-dimensional lattice induced by Wannier-Stark-Landau localization (arXiv)

    • Score : 19304

    s41467-026-74659-9 Ultrafast photoreduction driven by interfacial spin exchange in manganese-doped quantum dots (Nature Communications)

    • Score : 19282

    2606.26548v1 Topological phase transition driven by in-plane spin rotation (arXiv)

    • Score : 18727

    2606.20850v1 Hydrodynamic tails in chaotic spin chains with quantum group symmetry (arXiv)

    • Score : 18137

    s9bc-jcs9 Hearing the Light: Stray-Field Noise from the Emergent Photon in Quantum Spin Ice (PRL)

    • Score : 18131

    svt2-m3pp Spectroscopic Demarcation of Emergent Photons and Spinons in a Dipolar-Octupolar Quantum Spin Liquid (PRL)
